stemHtml: Why would a pilot choose to glide for minimum rate of descent after complete engine failure?

options.a: To give the maximum time to complete emergency drills before a forced landing or ditching.
options.b: To give the best chance of reaching a suitable forced landing aerodrome.
options.c: To give maximum airflow through jet engines, to assist a restart.
options.d: To glide as far as possible in a headwind.
